fields.label: QR Code (scan with WhatsApp on phone)
fields.options:
📱 Configure settings on the left, then click Refresh Status & QR at the top.

The QR code will appear here automatically when the session is ready to pair.

fields.description: Sends to the employee's Mobile (cell_number on the Employee record). Verify numbers first — salary data is sensitive.
fields.label: Send Salary Slip PDF to employee on submit

fields.description: Leave blank for the default format
fields.label: Salary Slip Print Format

fields.description: Digits only, e.g. 977. Prefixed to employee mobile numbers that don't already include a country code.
fields.label: Default Country Code

fields.description: When enabled, all WhatsApp notifications go to the Test Chat ID below instead of employee phones. Use for testing without disturbing employees.
fields.label: Test Mode

fields.description: Chat ID to receive test notifications (e.g., 919106526195@c.us for Mitesh). Only used when Test Mode is enabled.
fields.label: Test Chat ID
